---
title: "11. 节制与平衡"
subtitle: "Limitation, Moderation, and Balanced Measure"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 11
categories: [i-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How restraint, decrease/increase, centered measure, and the balanced terminal pair map lawful limitation onto Zeckendorf optimality, modular compensation, and GMS saturation."
---

**Hexagrams:** 小畜(9), 谦(15), 损(41), 益(42), 节(60), 中孚(61), 小过(62), 既济(63), 未济(64)  
**Omega Directions:** `Zeckendorf representation`, `ring arithmetic`, `golden-mean shift`

{{< include articles/category_11_limitation_moderation_balance.md >}}

---

[Back to I Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)


## Infographic

![category_11_limitation_moderation_balance Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_11_limitation_moderation_balance_infographic.png)

## Video

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_11_limitation_moderation_balance_video.mp4 >}}

**Media Downloads:**

- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_11_limitation_moderation_balance_infographic.png)
